Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 336 upvotes, 44 comments
  2. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 193 upvotes, 24 comments
  3. Linux Page Faults, MMAP, and userfaultfd for faster VM boots 27 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Building a Reader for the Smallest Hard Drive 15 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 136 upvotes, 28 comments
  6. Physicists Trace Sun's Magnetic Engine, 200k Kilometers Below Surface 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found 121 upvotes, 25 comments
  8. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 109 upvotes, 22 comments
  9. ArXiv Declares Independence from Cornell 183 upvotes, 44 comments
  10. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 195 upvotes, 60 comments
  11. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 405 upvotes, 155 comments
  12. FSFE supporters affected: Payment provider Nexi cancelled us 19 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011) 128 upvotes, 49 comments
  14. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 165 upvotes, 69 comments
  15. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 109 upvotes, 44 comments
  16. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 70 upvotes, 26 comments
  17. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 52 upvotes, 20 comments
  18. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 200 upvotes, 101 comments
  19. Astral to Join OpenAI 1331 upvotes, 823 comments
  20. Push events into a running session with channels 317 upvotes, 178 comments
  21. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 244 upvotes, 138 comments
  22. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce 113 upvotes, 60 comments
  23. Last love: a romance in a care home (2023) 22 upvotes, 7 comments
  24. FSF Threatens Anthropic over Infringed Copyright: Share Your LLMs Freel 51 upvotes, 23 comments
  25. A Journey Through Infertility 23 upvotes, 8 comments
  26. Bombarding gamblers with offers greatly increases betting and gambling harm 134 upvotes, 101 comments
  27. How many branches can your CPU predict? 66 upvotes, 45 comments
  28. Waymo Safety Impact 295 upvotes, 298 comments
  29. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 731 upvotes, 801 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 350 upvotes, 587 comments

Last generated 4:00pm, 20 March 2026. Source here.
